-Wundef -Wnon-virtual-dtor -Woverloaded-virtual -Werror=return-type -Werror=init-self -Wvla -Wdate-time -fexceptions -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,--no-undefined -Wl,--fatal-warnings
